info.title: Datenschutzagent API
info.description: KI-gestützte Datenschutz-Compliance-Plattform. Verwaltet Vorgänge, Dokumente und automatisierte Playbook-Prüfungen gemäß DSGVO.

get.description: Return the current user (from OIDC token or CURRENT_USER_ID/default when OIDC disabled).
Return read-only view of app settings (no secrets).
Test connectivity to Ollama, Weaviate, MinIO, Postgres, Redis.
List all registered users with their roles.

patch.description: Update the role of a user. Allowed roles: viewer, editor, admin.

get.description: Zeigt Vorgänge, die beim nächsten Retention-Scan archiviert würden (Dry-Run, keine Änderungen).

post.description: Führt sofort einen Retention-Scan durch und archiviert fällige Vorgänge.

get.description: Testet die SMTP-Verbindung für E-Mail-Benachrichtigungen.

post.description: Scannt Fristen und sendet E-Mail-Benachrichtigungen sofort (ohne auf den Celery-Beat-Job zu warten).

Scannt offene Findings mit Schwere CRITICAL/HIGH und informiert den
jeweiligen Case-Assignee (Cooldown 20h, User-Master-Switch wird beachtet).

Triggert einen Vergleich des aktuellen Composite-Scores gegen den
Snapshot vor `risk_velocity.window_days` Tagen. Bei Rückgängen ≥ der
Signifikanz-Schwelle wird eine E-Mail an alle aktiven Admin-Nutzer
versendet.

get.description:
Gibt die aktuell geladene Risk-Config zurück (inkl. Profil, YAML-Pfad
und ob es sich um Defaults handelt). Lesen darf jeder mit App-Zugang.

put.description:
Validiert die übergebene Config, persistiert sie als YAML
(vorheriger Stand als .bak.{timestamp} gesichert) und invalidiert
den LRU-Cache. Bei ungültigem Schema → 422.

post.description:
Nützlich, wenn das YAML extern geändert wurde — leert den LRU-Cache,
damit die nächste Anfrage die Datei neu lädt.

Berechnet vorher/nachher-Vergleiche für ein paar synthetische
Beispiel-Cases — komplett ohne LLM-Aufrufe und ohne die echte
Konfiguration zu verändern.

get.description: Return metadata for all prompt template keys (description, placeholders).

schema.title: Response Get Prompt Template Keys Api V1 Admin Prompt Templates Keys Get

get.description: List all versions for a given key, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Prompt Template Versions Api V1 Admin Prompt Templates Versions Get

get.description: List active prompt templates. Optionally filter by key.

schema.title: Response List Prompt Templates Api V1 Admin Prompt Templates Get

post.description: Create a new version. If set_active is true, this version becomes active for the key.

patch.description: Update a template (e.g. set is_active to true to activate this version).

get.description:
Return all currently running playbook check jobs across all cases.

Used by the frontend to display a global status banner showing active checks.
List cases with optional pagination and server-side filtering. Returns items and total count.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Volltext-Suche in Titel, Abteilung, Vorgangstyp, Ersteller, Zugewiesenem
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Volltext-Suche in Titel, Abteilung, Vorgangstyp, Ersteller, Zugewiesenem

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filtert nach Case-Status (z. B. intake, in_review, completed)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filtert nach Case-Status (z. B. intake, in_review, completed)

parameters.name: has_open_findings

schema.description: True = nur Vorgänge mit mindestens einem offenen Befund
schema.title: Has Open Findings

parameters.description: True = nur Vorgänge mit mindestens einem offenen Befund

parameters.name: deadline_overdue

schema.description: True = nur überfällige Vorgänge (Frist < heute, Status nicht completed)
schema.title: Deadline Overdue

parameters.description: True = nur überfällige Vorgänge (Frist < heute, Status nicht completed)

parameters.name: include_archived

schema.description: True = auch archivierte Vorgänge zurückgeben (Standard: nur nicht-archivierte)
schema.title: Include Archived

parameters.description: True = auch archivierte Vorgänge zurückgeben (Standard: nur nicht-archivierte)

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sortierfeld: updated_at (Standard), created_at, deadline, title, status
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: Sortierfeld: updated_at (Standard), created_at, deadline, title, status

post.description: Create a new case.

patch.description:
Bulk update cases: set status or archive/unarchive multiple cases at once.
Body: { case_ids: [uuid], status?: string, archive?: bool }

get.description: Export cases list as CSV. Applies same filters as GET /cases.
Get a single case by ID.

patch.description: Update a case (partial update). Returns 403 if case is archived.

delete.description: Delete a case and its documents/findings (cascade).

get.description: Get activity log for the case (run_checks, finding_status_updated, etc.), sorted by time descending.

schema.title: Response Get Case Activities Api V1 Cases  Case Id  Activities Get

get.description: Exportiert den vollständigen Audit-Trail eines Vorgangs als CSV (für Behördennachweise).

post.description:
Erstellt ein ZIP-Audit-Paket mit Befunden, Dokumentliste, Activity-Log und SHA-256-Manifest.

Geeignet für externe Prüfer und Aufsichtsbehörden. Kein Ursprungsdokument-Inhalt –
nur strukturierte Metadaten und Prüfergebnisse.

Dupliziert einen Vorgang: kopiert Metadaten, erstellt keinen neuen Dokument-Upload.
Optional: LLM passt Verarbeitungskontext auf neuen Titel/Abteilung an.
Archive a case. Archived cases are read-only and hidden from the default list view.
Unarchive a previously archived case.

get.description:
Get stored DSB summary report for the case. Returns 404 if no report exists.
format=json (with report_stale, stale_reason) or format=markdown (download).
Return status of report generation for polling: no_report, running, completed, failed.

post.description: Start DSB report generation. Returns 202 when queued (Celery), 200 when run synchronously.

get.description: List documents that have findings and can be downloaded as annotated DOCX.

schema.title: Response List Annotated Documents Api V1 Cases  Case Id  Annotated Documents Get

get.description: Download annotated document (content + findings). Query: format=docx (default) or format=pdf.

Return current risk score and history derived from completed run_checks jobs.

Score 0 = no open issues, 100 = maximum risk. Formula mirrors the dashboard complianceScore.
Return cases in the same department+case_type with overlapping open findings (by check_name).

schema.title: Response Get Similar Cases Api V1 Cases  Case Id  Similar Get

get.description: Return the latest run_checks job status for this case (for polling). Includes last_run activity for timeline and documents_changed_since_last_run flag.

Server-Sent Events stream for run-checks job progress.

Emits ``data: <json>`` events every 2 s while a job is running.
Sends a final ``event: done`` when the job reaches completed/failed/never_run,
then closes the stream.  The client can use ``EventSource`` instead of polling.

Event payload matches GET /{case_id}/run-checks/status.

post.description: Run playbook checks against all case documents. Returns 202 when queued (Celery), 200 with case when run synchronously.

get.description:
Export VVT normalization. Query: format=csv (default) or format=docx.
Uses first VVT document if document_id not given.
CSV: text/csv. DOCX: VVT Ziel-Template (document name, template, fields table).

Get VVT normalization for the case. Uses the first VVT document if document_id is not given.
Returns canonical VVT fields and template detection (LLM-based).

List organisation units for case creation and playbook assignment.
Source: DEPARTMENTS_CONFIG_PATH, or org_profiles/{ORG_PROFILE}/departments.yaml, or legacy fachbereiche.yaml.

schema.title: Response List Departments Api V1 Departments Get

get.description: List documents, optionally filtered by case_id and/or document_type. Ordered by type, then version (asc).

schema.title: Response List Documents Api V1 Documents Get

post.description: Upload a single document for a case. Text extraction runs asynchronously (Celery). document_type: vvt, screening, info_sheet_de, info_sheet_en, dsfa, avv, other.

get.description: Download the original document file. Access requires authentication (same as listing documents).
Get the extracted text content of a document (for in-app display). Includes extraction_status and extraction_error for UI state.
List comments for a document, sorted by created_at ascending.

schema.title: Response List Document Comments Api V1 Documents  Document Id  Comments Get

post.description: Add a comment to a document. Author is taken from current user.

get.description: Get a single document by ID.

patch.description: Update document metadata or extracted content. When content is updated, Weaviate chunks for this document are removed (RAG will use new content after re-indexing).

delete.description: Delete a document (DB record and storage file).

post.description: Upload multiple documents for a case in one request. Text extraction runs asynchronously (Celery). Same document_type and uploaded_by apply to all.

schema.title: Response Upload Documents Bulk Api V1 Documents Bulk Post

get.description:
Aggregierte Befund-Statistiken: nach Schweregrad, Kategorie, Abteilung, Top-Checks und Zeitverlauf (6 Monate).
Alle Teilabfragen werden in einem einzigen DB-Round-Trip via CTEs ausgeführt.
List findings with optional filters. Returns paginated results.

parameters.name: source_strategy

schema.description: Filter by check source: full_text or rag
schema.title: Source Strategy

parameters.description: Filter by check source: full_text or rag

parameters.name: has_due_date

schema.description: True = only findings with a due date set
schema.title: Has Due Date

parameters.description: True = only findings with a due date set

patch.description: Set the same status on multiple findings at once.

delete.description: Mehrere Befunde auf einmal löschen. Gibt die Anzahl gelöschter Befunde zurück.

get.description: Export findings as CSV (default) or DOCX. If case_id is omitted, exports all findings (org-wide).
List comments for a finding, sorted oldest-first.

schema.title: Response List Finding Comments Api V1 Findings  Finding Id  Comments Get

post.description: Add a comment to a finding (audit trail for status decisions).

get.description: Gibt alle Chat-Nachrichten für einen Befund zurück (älteste zuerst).

schema.title: Response Get Finding Chat Api V1 Findings  Finding Id  Chat Get

post.description: Sendet eine Nutzernachricht und erhält eine KI-Antwort im Befund-Kontext.

get.description: List legal bases with optional filtering by applicability and pagination.

schema.title: Response List Legal Bases Api V1 Legal Bases Get

post.description: Create a new legal base. Content is indexed in Weaviate for RAG when indexing is enabled.

get.description: Get a legal base by ID.

patch.description: Update a legal base. Weaviate chunks are re-indexed when content or title change.

delete.description: Delete a legal base. Weaviate chunks for this base are removed.

get.description: Playbooks that match the given attributes, highest match_priority first (for wizard and run-checks UI).

parameters.name: strict_case_type

schema.description: If true, playbooks with non-empty match.case_types must match case_type.
schema.title: Strict Case Type

parameters.description: If true, playbooks with non-empty match.case_types must match case_type.

schema.title: Response List Playbooks For Selection Api V1 Playbooks For Selection Get

get.description: List playbooks with optional filtering by active state and pagination.

schema.title: Response List Playbooks Api V1 Playbooks Get

post.description: Create a new playbook.

get.description: Get a playbook by ID.

patch.description: Update a playbook (partial). Saves a revision snapshot before applying changes.

get.description: List version history snapshots for a playbook (newest first).

post.description: Restore a playbook to a previous revision snapshot.

get.description:
Preview which checks of the playbook will apply to the given case's documents.

Returns a per-check breakdown (applicable / not applicable + reason) and a list of
document types that are missing but required by at least one check.

parameters.name: case_id

schema.description: Case ID to check document availability against.
schema.title: Case Id

parameters.description: Case ID to check document availability against.

get.description: List cases with VVT metadata (has_vvt_document, vvt_completeness from DSB report). No LLM.

parameters.name: has_vvt

schema.description: Filter: only with VVT (true) or without (false)
schema.title: Has Vvt

parameters.description: Filter: only with VVT (true) or without (false)

schema.title: Response Get Vvt Overview Api V1 Vvt Overview Get

get.description: Aggregate stats: totals and by department / case_type.
Export VVT overview as CSV (same filters as list). Max 5000 rows.

Prüft anhand der EDSA-Leitlinien (9-Faktoren-Test), ob eine DSFA gemäß Art. 35 DSGVO
erforderlich ist. Gibt score, Faktoren und Empfehlung zurück (keine LLM-Kosten).
Gibt die aktuelle DSFA für einen Vorgang zurück.

post.description: Startet die asynchrone Generierung einer DSFA für den Vorgang.

get.description: Gibt den Status des letzten DSFA-Generierungsjobs zurück.

patch.description: Markiert die DSFA als finalisiert (nicht mehr bearbeitbar).

get.description: Aggregierte DSR-Statistiken: Antwortzeiten, On-Time-Rate, Typ- und Status-Verteilung.
Listet DSR-Anfragen mit optionalen Filtern.

post.description: Erstellt eine neue Betroffenenrechts-Anfrage.

patch.description: Aktualisiert Status, Zugewiesenen oder Antwort einer DSR-Anfrage.

post.description: Generiert per LLM einen Entwurf für das Antwortschreiben.

get.description: Gibt das Aktivitätsprotokoll einer DSR-Anfrage zurück.

schema.title: Response Get Dsr Activity Api V1 Dsr  Request Id  Activity Get

get.description: Aggregierte Datenpannen-Statistiken: 72h-Compliance, Risikoverteilung, Monatstrend.
Listet Datenpannen mit optionalen Filtern.

post.description: Erfasst eine neue Datenschutzverletzung und setzt die 72h-Frist.

patch.description: Aktualisiert Status, Risikobewertung oder Meldestatus einer Datenpanne.

post.description: Generiert per LLM einen Meldungsentwurf für die Aufsichtsbehörde.

schema.title: Response Get Breach Activity Api V1 Data Breaches  Breach Id  Activity Get

get.description: Aggregierte AVV-Statistiken: Status-Verteilung, Ablaufrisiko, Risiko-Score-Verteilung.

post.description:
Führt eine LLM-gestützte Datenschutz-Risikobewertung für den Auftragsverarbeiter durch.

Bewertet 5 Risikodimensionen und gibt Risikoscore (0-100), Risikolevel
(low/medium/high/critical) sowie Maßnahmenempfehlungen zurück.
Das Ergebnis wird im AVV-Datensatz gespeichert.

get.description: Gibt Implementierungsrate und Aufschlüsselung nach Status/Kategorie zurück.
List all file attachments for a TOM measure.

schema.title: Response List Tom Attachments Api V1 Tom  Tom Id  Attachments Get

post.description: Upload a file attachment to a TOM measure. Allowed: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, DOC. Max configured upload size.

get.description: Download a TOM attachment file.

delete.description: Delete a TOM attachment (file + DB record).

schema.title: Response List Templates Api V1 Case Templates Get

post.description: Erstellt einen neuen Vorgang basierend auf einer Vorlage.

schema.title: Response List Privacy Policies Api V1 Privacy Policies Get
Response List Privacy Policies For Case Api V1 Cases  Case Id  Privacy Policies Get

post.description:
Generiert eine neue, vorgangsspezifische Datenschutzerklaerung.

Der Inhalt wird vom aktiven LLM erzeugt und basiert ausschliesslich auf den
Daten dieses Vorgangs (plus AVV der gleichen Abteilung).

schema.title: Response List Webhooks Api V1 Admin Webhooks Get

post.description: Sendet ein Test-Event an den konfigurierten Webhook-Endpunkt.

schema.title: Response Get Webhook Deliveries Api V1 Admin Webhooks  Webhook Id  Deliveries Get
Response List Webhook Events Api V1 Admin Webhooks Events Get

get.description: Cross-module Risiko-Aggregation pro Abteilung und org-weite KPIs.
AVV-Ablauf-Pipeline + TOM-Reviews + DSFA-Coverage fuer high-risk Cases.
DSR-MTTR + Breach-Notification-Speed + Findings-Resolution + Workflow-Funnels.
Maturity-Score (5 Sub-Scores, gewichtet) + 6-Monats-Trend aus taeglichen Snapshots.

Vergleicht den aktuellen Compliance-Reife-Score gegen den Wert vor
`window_days` (Default aus `risk_config.yaml -> risk_velocity.window_days`).

Antwort enthält pro Department Composite-Score plus Trend (up/down/stable)
für jeden Sub-Score (vvt/dsfa/avv/tom/velocity). Datenquelle:
`compliance_maturity_snapshots`.

schema.title: Response List Case Mitigations Api V1 Cases  Case Id  Mitigations Get

get.description:
Returns inherent vs residual risk for the case's DSFA.

Reads from the persisted DSFA payload — re-running the LLM is not
needed. If no DSFA exists yet, returns 404 so the UI can surface
a hint instead of an empty card.

schema.title: Response List Avv Mitigations Api V1 Avv  Contract Id  Mitigations Get

get.description: Compute baseline-vs-implemented gap analysis across ALL TOMs in the org.

Same baseline check, but scoped to TOMs assigned to the case's department.

Falls back to the global set when the case has no department string
or when no department-matching TOMs are tagged with ``department_codes``.

Return a signed activity-log export for the case.

The ``X-Audit-Signature`` response header contains an HMAC-SHA256 over
the response body; auditors can re-verify by hashing the file with
the same key (see ``services/audit_export_service.verify_audit_signature``).

Render the case's VVT data as an Art-30-style ROPA (CSV or DOCX).

Uses the first attached VVT document by default; ``document_id`` lets
callers pick a specific one when a case has multiple VVT variants.

Return OIDC configuration for the frontend (login URL, client id, scopes).
No authentication required. When OIDC is disabled, frontend may skip login.

post.description:
Exchange a PKCE authorization code for an HttpOnly session cookie.

Only available when ``auth_session_cookie_enabled=true``. The legacy
Bearer-token path (``/auth/token``, if implemented elsewhere) stays
separate so deployments can migrate stepwise.
Invalidate the session (Redis + cookies).

get.description:
Return public application configuration for the frontend.
No authentication required (like /health and /auth/config).

Health check for load balancers and Docker.
Checks Ollama (if enabled), Postgres, and Redis. Returns degraded if any are unreachable.

ActivityResponse.title: ActivityResponse
ActivityResponse.description: Single activity log entry for the timeline.

AnnotatedDocumentListItem.title: AnnotatedDocumentListItem
AnnotatedDocumentListItem.description: One document that has findings and can be downloaded as annotated DOCX.

CaseRiskScoreResponse.title: CaseRiskScoreResponse
CaseRiskScoreResponse.description: Current risk score and history for a case (derived from run_checks_jobs).

DocumentUpdate.title: DocumentUpdate
DocumentUpdate.description: Partial update for document (e.g. extracted content for LLM/checks).

PlaybookMatchResult.title: PlaybookMatchResult
PlaybookMatchResult.description: Playbook plus match score from GET /playbooks/for-selection.

RiskConfigUpdateRequest.title: RiskConfigUpdateRequest
RiskConfigUpdateRequest.description: Body for PUT /admin/risk-config — `config` is validated server-side.

RiskDeltaSide.title: RiskDeltaSide
RiskDeltaSide.description: One snapshot (inherent or residual) of a risk-bearing object.

playbook_id.title: Playbook Id
playbook_id.description: Playbook whose checks to run against case documents.

strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.description: Run full_text and/or rag (RAG uses Weaviate chunks). Both can run in parallel for comparison.

skip_resolved.title: Skip Resolved
skip_resolved.description: When True (default), findings already resolved (accepted, fixed, overruled, in_review) are not re-created even if the check would fail again. Set to False to force a full re-check that ignores all prior review decisions.

UserPreferences.title: UserPreferences
UserPreferences.description: User UI preferences (theme, language, placeholder for notifications).

VVTFieldResponse.title: VVTFieldResponse
VVTFieldResponse.description: Single field in the canonical VVT model.

VVTNormalizationResponse.title: VVTNormalizationResponse
VVTNormalizationResponse.description: Response for VVT normalization: template detection + extracted fields.

VVTOverviewItem.title: VVTOverviewItem
VVTOverviewItem.description: One row in the VVT overview: case with VVT metadata (no LLM).

VVTOverviewStatsGroup.title: VVTOverviewStatsGroup
VVTOverviewStatsGroup.description: Aggregation for one department or case_type.

VVTOverviewStatsResponse.title: VVTOverviewStatsResponse
VVTOverviewStatsResponse.description: Stats for VVT overview: totals + by department + by case_type.

tags.name: cases
tags.description: Datenschutz-Vorgänge verwalten (erstellen, bearbeiten, archivieren, Prüfungen ausführen).

tags.name: documents
tags.description: Dokumente hochladen, herunterladen und Textextraktion verwalten.

tags.name: tom
tags.description: Technisch-Organisatorische Maßnahmen (Art. 32 DSGVO) – Katalog und Implementierungsstatus.
